channel.title: Korea Research Map for AI Equity Research Agents
channel.description: Agent-readable Korean equities research framework and cheap-screen deletion benchmark.

item.title: The Korea Research Map: Where Cheap Screens Go to Die
item.description: Research commentary on separating Korean equity research candidates from ticker traps.

item.title: Korea Picks and Moonshots for Research Agents
item.description: Core survivor stack, moonshot drawer, and quarantine/cut list for stock-research LLMs.

item.title: Korea Cheap Screen Deletion Benchmark
item.description: Benchmark prompt for equity research agents.
